match.userMessage:
Generate the motion prompt for this scene.

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene1",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT\n\nRain streaks the wide window in crisp, tactile lines under bright natural light, casting clean directional shadows across the sleek newsroom. A reporter's hands move with effortless precision over the glowing terminal, keys clacking in rhythmic detail.\n\nREPORTER\nWe go live in ten.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "We go live in ten.",
        "tone": "calm professional"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Newsroom Setup",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Establishing the newsroom atmosphere and initial live prep"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy captured on bright natural window light, REPORTER hands positioned with effortless precision over the glowing terminal keyboard mid-keystroke in a sleek newsroom at night, fingers tensed with potential energy and rhythmic detail as they hover above the keys, wide window in the background showing crisp tactile rain streaks casting clean directional shadows across minimalist desks and surfaces, shallow depth of field emphasizing the hands and terminal with airy bokeh on the background, high-key true-to-life color grading featuring crisp whites and neutral tones punctuated by one accent hue, dynamic handheld framing with natural micro-movement from an eye-level slightly above angle",
      "negativePrompt": "blurry motion, heavy shadows, cluttered desks, warm tungsten lighting, holographic screens, floating interfaces, text overlays, subtitles, low contrast, overexposed highlights",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Opening frame of an empty sleek newsroom at night with rain visible on the window and a reporter preparing to go live by interacting with a terminal.",
        "subject": "Reporter hands moving with precision over glowing terminal keyboard in mid-action pose.",
        "environment": "Sleek modern newsroom interior featuring minimal desks, wide windows, and night-time urban setting with visible rain streaks on glass.",
        "lighting": "Bright natural window light creating clean directional shadows and high-key airy atmosphere with true-to-life colors.",
        "camera": "Eye-level slightly above handheld shot with shallow depth of field and natural micro-movement.",
        "composition": "Focus on foreground hands and terminal against softly blurred window and desk background for tactile emphasis.",
        "style": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy and minimal processing.",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, high resolution, crisp detail on textures and surfaces, lifted shadows keeping the scene airy.",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool mood with quiet anticipation of live broadcast."
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "reporter"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "newsroom_night",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "#FFFFFF #F0E6D3 #D4536D #1A1A1A #E8F4E8",
    "lightingSetup": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows and high-key airy quality",
    "styleTag": "modern social-first product photography tactile editorial"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context: Where is the movement coming from?)
(none)
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context: Where does the movement need to end up?)
{
  "sceneId": "scene2",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "The producer rushes in, fingers pressing the printed lede with urgency. The page lands on the counter amid curated minimal chaos.\n\nPRODUCER\nStory just broke. We need this on air now.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "PRODUCER",
        "line": "Story just broke. We need this on air now.",
        "tone": "urgent tense"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Producer Enters with Breaking News",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Delivery of urgent breaking story update"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Modern social-first editorial photography with clean tactile energy, PRODUCER rushing forward into the sleek newsroom at night, fingers pressing the printed lede with urgency as the page lands on the counter amid curated minimal chaos of scattered papers and equipment, rain streaks visible on the wide window under bright natural light casting clean directional shadows across polished surfaces, high-key airy atmosphere with crisp whites and subtle warmth, handheld camera angle with shallow depth of field and natural micro-movement, dynamic slight overhead framing that emphasizes the moment the page hits the counter.",
      "negativePrompt": "floating screens, holograms, text overlays, heavy diffusion, blurry motion, cluttered background, dramatic low-key lighting",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Producer rushes in and slams the printed lede onto the counter with urgency, page landing amid minimal curated desk chaos",
        "subject": "PRODUCER mid-action pressing the page down",
        "environment": "Sleek modern INT. NEWSROOM at night with wide rain-streaked window in background and minimal desk clutter",
        "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows, high-key airy feel and subtle golden warmth on edges",
        "camera": "Handheld eye-level angle with shallow depth of field and natural micro-movement",
        "composition": "Dynamic framing centered on the descending page and urgent hand gesture, counter in lower third",
        "style": "Modern editorial product photography with tactile energy and crisp true-to-life color",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, sharp focus on action, high resolution, slight film grain for texture",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, urgent, sensory, effortlessly cool with immediate real-world energy"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "producer"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "int_newsroom_night",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "#FFFFFF #F0E6D3 #D4536D #1A1A1A #E8F4E8",
    "lightingSetup": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows and high-key airy quality",
    "styleTag": "fresh_sensory_editorial"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<CHARACTER_BIBLE>
(Use only for gait/movement style/mannerisms - ignore physical appearance)
[]
</CHARACTER_BIBLE>

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
